ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility of the item */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum retail price of the item */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item type */,
  "item_fat_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item fat content */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_fat_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_fat_content_id") REFERENCES item_fat_content ("item_fat_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet */,
  "outlet_location" TEXT /* Location of the outlet */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet */,
  "outlet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet type */,
  "outlet_manager" TEXT /* Name of the outlet manager */,
  "outlet_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Email address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_opening_date" TEXT /* Date the outlet was opened */,
  "outlet_status" TEXT /* Status of the outlet (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_type_id") REFERENCES outlet_types ("outlet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item sold */,
  "outlet_id" TEXT /* ID of the outlet where the item was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the sale */,
  "sale_promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used for the sale */,
  "sale_profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the sale */,
  "sale_tax" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the location */,
  "location_region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "location_zone" TEXT /* Zone where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_type_combined" (
  "item_type_combined_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type combination */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_combined_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_type_combined_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_types" (
  "outlet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet type */,
  "outlet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_fat_content" (
  "item_fat_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item fat content */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item */,
  "fat_content" REAL /* Fat content of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_fat_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_fat_content_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, sales manager, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
